parameters.content:
## Native Bilig WorkPaper node

Install `@bilig/n8n-nodes-workpaper` from self-hosted n8n Community nodes, then import this workflow to test the actual community node.

It runs the hosted forecast smoke test and then evaluates a caller-owned WorkPaper JSON document.

## Production boundary

The default base URL points at Bilig's public demo endpoint. For private workbook data, run Bilig inside your network and change `Bilig Base URL` on both Bilig WorkPaper nodes.
